cookie.text: We use cookies to enhance your experience and remember your preferences. By continuing you agree to our

hero.subtitle: Daily Shia Islamic Wisdom, Prayer & Reflection
hero.desc: Begin each day in the light of the Ahl al-Bayt. Receive timeless wisdom from the Masumeen, heartfelt prayers, and personal guidance rooted in the sacred tradition of Shia Islam.

verse1.text: "Allah only desires to keep away impurity from you, O People of the Household, and to purify you with a thorough purification."

about.label: About Ayara
about.title: A Companion of Light from the Ahl al-Bayt
about.subtitle: Ayara brings the timeless wisdom of the Masumeen — the Prophet, Fatimah al-Zahra, and the 12 Imams — into the rhythm of your daily life. Authentic, deeply rooted, and beautifully delivered to your pocket.
about.f1_text: Every reflection, every prayer, every word in Ayara is rooted in the teachings of the Ahl al-Bayt (AS) — the blessed household chosen and purified by Allah.
about.f2_text: Receive a verse from the Holy Quran or a narration from Nahj al-Balagha and the trusted books of the Ahl al-Bayt tradition — each day, a new light.
about.f3_text: Walk alongside the 14 Masumeen. Each day, Ayara introduces you to one of the infallible Imams — their life, their legacy, and their eternal light to guide your path.
about.f4_text: Choose from 15 spiritual categories and receive deeply personal wisdom in the Shia spirit — crafted for your heart, your struggle, your moment.
about.f5_text: A question about your deen, a hardship on your heart, something you've always wondered? Ask it. Ayara answers with wisdom rooted in the Shia tradition — directly for you.
about.f6_text: Wherever you stand in this world, face the sacred Ka'ba with certainty. Ayara's live Qibla compass is always accurate and always available — free.
about.f7_text: Never miss Salah. Ayara calculates the precise times for all five daily prayers — Fajr, Dhuhr, Asr, Maghrib, and Isha — based on your exact location, every single day.
about.f8_text: Enable gentle reminders for any or all of the five daily prayers. Choose which Salahs to be notified for — let Ayara call you at precisely the right moment.
about.f9_text: A single, large tap for your dhikr. Haptic pulse with every count. Auto-resets at your chosen target with a gentle visual. SubhanAllah. Alhamdulillah. Allahu Akbar.
about.f10_text: Browse the full month of precise prayer times at a glance. Plan your days and weeks around Salah with a beautiful, location-accurate monthly calendar.
about.f11_text: Draw from the ocean of Imam Ali's wisdom. Ayara weaves the sayings of Nahj al-Balagha into your daily life — the most eloquent words after the Holy Quran.
about.f12_text: Build daily habits of reflection, dhikr, and closeness to Allah and the Ahl al-Bayt. Ayara walks with you on the path toward becoming the best version of yourself.

daily.label: What Awaits You Each Day
daily.title: Every Morning, a New Blessing
daily.d1_text: A carefully chosen verse from the Holy Quran or a narration from the Ahl al-Bayt — from Nahj al-Balagha, Sahifah al-Sajjadiyya, or the trusted books of the Imams — to illuminate your day.
daily.d2_text: Each day, walk beside one of the 14 Masumeen. Discover their life, their words, and their profound impact — the Prophet, Fatimah al-Zahra, and the 12 Imams whose light never fades.
daily.d3_text: Your daily spiritual companion. A reflection crafted with wisdom and intention from the Shia tradition — speaking directly to where you are on your path today.

ahlbayt.label: Words That Endure Forever
ahlbayt.title: Wisdom from the Masumeen
ahlbayt.subtitle: Ayara carries the living wisdom of the Ahl al-Bayt — words spoken by the Infallibles that have guided believers across centuries and continents.

categories.label: 15 Reflection Categories
categories.title: Every Dimension of Your Soul
categories.subtitle: Choose the aspect of your life where your heart seeks guidance. Spend a reflection to receive deeply personal wisdom rooted in the Shia tradition.

qibla.label: Face the Sacred Direction
qibla.title: How Far Are You from the Holy Ka'ba?
qibla.subtitle: Allow Ayara to reveal your current distance from the sacred Ka'ba in Mecca — and open the app for a live, real-time Qibla compass.
qibla.app_cta: Download Ayara for a live, real-time Qibla compass on your phone — always accurate, always available, completely free.

spotlight.label: Complete Islamic Companion
spotlight.title: More Than Reflection — Complete in Every Way
spotlight.subtitle: Alongside your daily wisdom and personal reflections from the Ahl al-Bayt, six powerful tools are always at your fingertips.
spotlight.ask_text: A question about your deen. A hardship weighing on your heart. Something you've always wondered about in Islam. Ask it freely — Ayara responds with a thoughtful, personalised answer rooted in the authentic Shia tradition. One reflection spent, one answer received, crafted directly for you.
spotlight.ask_li1: Ask about Quran, Nahj al-Balagha, or Shia jurisprudence
spotlight.ask_li2: Seek guidance on personal struggles in the Shia spirit
spotlight.ask_li3: Receive answers in your own language
spotlight.qibla_text: Wherever you find yourself — at home, travelling, or somewhere unfamiliar — face the sacred Ka'ba with certainty. Ayara's Qibla compass points toward the Holy Ka'ba in Mecca using your device's compass, precise and always available.
spotlight.qibla_li1: Real-time compass toward the Holy Ka'ba
spotlight.prayer_text: Salah is the pillar of faith. Never miss a prayer. Ayara calculates and displays the precise times for all five daily prayers based on your exact location — Fajr, Dhuhr, Asr, Maghrib, and Isha — refreshed every day.
spotlight.notif_text: Stay connected to Salah throughout your day. Choose notifications for any — or all — of the five daily prayers and let Ayara gently call you at the precise prayer time for your location.
spotlight.notif_li2: Choose exactly which prayers to be reminded of
spotlight.notif_li3: Arrives at the precise prayer time for your location
spotlight.tasbeeh_text: One large tap target at the centre of your screen. Each tap increments your dhikr count with a gentle haptic pulse. Reach your target and Ayara resets with a soft visual. Choose your phrase: SubhanAllah, Alhamdulillah, Allahu Akbar, or beloved Shia formulas like Ya Ali and Ya Hussain.
spotlight.tasbeeh_li2: Auto-resets at your target (33, 99…) with a gentle cue
spotlight.tasbeeh_li3: Set your target and choose your dhikr phrase
spotlight.calendar_text: See every prayer time for every day of the coming month at a glance. Fajr to Isha, day by day — all calculated for your exact location. Plan your schedule, prepare for travel, or simply stay aware of how each day unfolds in the light of prayer.
spotlight.calendar_li1: Full month view of all 5 daily prayer times
spotlight.calendar_li3: Plan your entire month around Salah

verse2.text: "Never shall we submit to humiliation. Allah refuses it for us, His Messenger refuses it, and so do the believers."
verse2.cite: Imam Hussain ibn Ali (AS) · Day of Ashura, Karbala

pricing.label: Choose Your Path
pricing.title: Begin with Standard, Flourish with Wilaya
pricing.subtitle: Every Muslim deserves access to the wisdom of the Ahl al-Bayt. Start with what is included, and when you are ready — unlock the full experience of Ayara.
pricing.std_desc: When you download Ayara you receive 150 reflections to explore wisdom from the Ahl al-Bayt. Spend them across all 15 categories or Ask Ayara Anything.
pricing.wil_desc: Unlock the full Ayara experience — prayer tools, live Qibla compass, 300 additional reflections, and the ability to top up whenever you wish.
pricing.wil_f8: ✓   Early access to new Ahl al-Bayt categories
pricing.note: ✦   Reflections are yours to spend however you choose — on any of the 15 categories, or to Ask Ayara Anything.

download.label: Available Now
download.title:
Carry the Light of the
Ahl al-Bayt With You
download.desc: Download Ayara and begin your daily journey of faith, reflection, and closeness to Allah and the Ahl al-Bayt — in your pocket, in your heart, every morning you wake.

support.hero_subtitle: We are a small team and we care deeply about every person who uses Ayara. Find answers below, or reach us directly — we read every message.
support.about_title_html: Built with Care by OakDev & AI AB
support.about_p1: Ayara is built with care by OakDev & AI AB, a small software company based in Uddevalla, Sweden. We are a team of developers and designers with a genuine passion for theology and the history of religion — and that curiosity is what drives everything we build.
support.about_p2: Our journey into Islamic apps began with a dear friend in the studio — a Sunni Muslim whose faith and love for Islam inspired us to build Nuria first. But we wanted to honour Islam in its full breadth, and so we built Ayara — a home for the Shia tradition, rooted in the wisdom of the Ahl al-Bayt (peace be upon them).
support.about_p3: We are not Muslims ourselves, but we approach this work with deep respect, sincere study, and a commitment to getting it right. Every feature, every word, and every design decision is made with your spiritual journey in mind — and we are grateful for the trust the community places in us.
support.faq_subtitle: Everything you need to know about Ayara, reflections, and how we work. Can't find your answer? Send us a message below.

footer.tagline: Wisdom of the Ahl al-Bayt — every single day.

delete.title: Delete Your Account
delete.subtitle: You have the right to permanently delete your account and all associated data at any time — no questions asked.
delete.warning_title: This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
delete.warning_body: Deleting your account will permanently erase all your data, your reflection balance, and your content history. Any unused reflections will be forfeited. There is no grace period — once confirmed in the app, deletion begins immediately.
delete.methods_sub: The in-app method is the fastest and easiest.
delete.step1: Open the Ayara app on your device.
delete.step2: Tap Settings (bottom of the main screen).
delete.step3: Scroll all the way to the bottom.
delete.step5: Confirm the deletion. Your account and all data are permanently erased.
delete.estep3: Include the email address linked to your Ayara account so we can identify it.
delete.estep4: We will process your request and confirm deletion within 30 days.
delete.data6: Any support messages you sent us
delete.gdpr_body: As a user, you have the right to erasure ("right to be forgotten") under Article 17 of the GDPR. Deleting your account fully satisfies this right. If you have any questions about how your data is handled, please read our Privacy Policy or contact us at hello@oakdev.app.
delete.questions: Have questions or need help? We are here.
